summary: Completed frontend testing of Dashboard UI refactoring. Dashboard successfully consumes unified GET /api/dashboard endpoint. All UI components render correctly: What's Next card with governance_insights, Health Score card with 5 criteria, Quick Actions grid (6 actions), Stats section, Recent Activity timeline.

integration_issues.issue: After fresh login, trusts not loaded until page refresh. LoginPage.js doesn't call loadTrusts() after successful login.

passed_tests: Dashboard calls GET /api/dashboard endpoint (single unified call)
What's Next card displays governance_insights from API
Insight 0 shows: title='Overdue Tasks', description, +20 pts badge, 'View Tasks' button
Insight 1 shows: title='Annual Review Due', description, +20 pts badge, 'Schedule Review' button
Insight action buttons navigate to correct routes (action_path=/calendar)
Governance Health Score card shows total_score (60) with score circle
5 criteria displayed: Quarterly Minutes (20/20), Task Compliance (0/20), Compensation Alignment (20/20), Distribution Documentation (20/20), Annual Review (0/20)
Quick Actions grid renders all 6 actions with correct titles
Quick action buttons navigate to correct paths
Stats section shows total_decisions (6) and pending_reviews (4)
Recent Activity timeline displays 10 activities from dashboard response
Activities show type icons, titles, dates, and status badges (COMPLETED, PENDING, WITHIN_PLAN)
Distribution summary shows '3 distributions' and '$25,500 YTD'
data-testid attributes present: dashboard-page, whats-next-card, insight-0, insight-1, insight-action-0, insight-action-1, view-governance-link, quick-action-0 through quick-action-5

unified_dashboard_api.note: Multiple calls in dev due to React StrictMode - expected behavior

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix login flow to call loadTrusts() after successful authentication in LoginPage.js (line 75-79)
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.js doesn't call loadTrusts() after login - trusts only load on page refresh via checkAuth()
React StrictMode causes duplicate API calls in development - this is expected and not a production issue
React setState warning in console during login navigation - minor, doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data from iteration_25
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard UI refactoring complete. Dashboard uses unified /api/dashboard endpoint. All UI elements verified: What's Next card with insights, Health Score with 5 criteria, Quick Actions grid (6 buttons), Stats (decisions/pending), Recent Activity timeline. Known issue: trusts don't auto-load after login (requires refresh) - this is a pre-existing issue not related to dashboard refactoring.
